email.headerregistry/BaseHeader/name.name: name
email.headerregistry/BaseHeader/name.description: The name of the header (the portion of the field before the ‘:’). This is exactly the value passed in the header_factory call for name; that is, case is preserved.

info.excerpt: The name of the header (the portion of the field before the ‘:’). This is exactly the value passed in the header_factory call for name; that is, case is preserved.
